$comment: Cluster-F F2 (core_bitwise): every bitwise/shift operator end-to-end. Witnesses the encodings this cycle added — x86 XOR (0x31 /r) + NOT (0xF7 /2) and arm64 MVN (ORN Xd,XZR,Xm = 0xAA2003E0) — plus the already-working & | << >> and the signed-arithmetic vs unsigned-logical right-shift distinction. Each operator is in a non-inlined function so its operands are runtime values (not const-folded), and the `release` arm runs the shipped optimizing pipeline over the same source. exit 42 == all operators correct on the target.
